strengths: 17+ years of hands-on engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure — comfortably clears the 15-year minimum
Entrepreneurial track record: founded GISCollective, shipped multiple open-source platforms, and ran freelance product work across a full career
Current role at re:cinq includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP framework work, showing active engagement with agentic AI tooling
concerns: AI experience is shallow and very recent (April 2025); no demonstrated history of building or shipping AI-powered products or platforms at scale
No advanced degree (Master's/PhD) in an AI-related field, and no evidence of recognized external AI expertise such as publications, patents, or prominent speaking
Career trajectory and titles (Senior/Staff Software Developer) reflect an individual contributor, not a director-level technical leader with customer advisory or organizational influence
response.justification: Bogdan is a well-rounded, experienced engineer with genuine entrepreneurial instincts and broad technical range, but this role demands a director-level AI strategist with deep, demonstrated AI expertise and a track record of influencing customers, partners, and engineering organizations at scale. His AI involvement is too recent and too thin to meet the bar, and his career arc has stayed firmly in hands-on development rather than technical leadership or strategic advisory work. The gap between his current profile and the role's expectations is significant enough to disqualify him at this level.
